findings: Monitor reads swarm-state.json via progress_dir from fleet.json (not hard-coded path). stampede-monitor.sh:122,145-147
Per-commander rows show squads launched/target and workers launched/target separately from top summary bar. stampede-monitor.sh:158-166,183-189

README documents metaswarm at high level (swarm-state.json path, 'real-time nested progress summaries') but omits rendered fields: squads, workers, run/done/fail/atoms, hb, phase, warnings. README.md:130-136
No visual separator between commander rows and worker rows; mixed roster differentiated only by row label text. stampede-monitor.sh:118-197
Orphan recovery hard-codes $BASE/commanders/$task_id/swarm-state.json but UI display trusts fleet.json progress_dir — minor divergence. stampede-monitor.sh:247-268
